title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
